message:
feat(policy): integrate ConnectorHostRuntime and ReliabilityRegistry into PolicyEngine

Wire connector host runtime (execution environment management) and reliability
registry (circuit breaker + DLQ) into PolicyEngine with config, constructors,
and accessor methods.

PolicyEngine now has 12 integrated subsystems.
4 new integration tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
